segment.source: Renders one centered pricing card with heading, a large price with billing period, a short rich-text description, a check-marked feature list (up to eight items), and a CTA button. Use it for: source sections offering exactly one plan or flat rate — a single membership fee, one service package with a price, 'one plan, everything included' copy. Prefer 'Three Tier Pricing' or 'Two Tier Pricing' for multiple plans; use 'Special Offer Pricing' for discount promotions.
